headline: All You Need to Know About AutoZone (AZO) Rating Upgrade to Buy
summary: AutoZone (AZO) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).

headline: Advance Auto Parts Stock Surges After Earnings. 2026 Off to a ‘Solid Start,’ CEO Says.
summary: The auto parts retailer reports better-than-expected earnings and sales growth in its fiscal first quarter.
